close_reason: No longer needed. Demux architecture replaces snapshot-based trimming: Demux tracks min_durable_version across ShardServers, reports to Log for trimming. Materializers recover from ObjectStorage snapshots + ShardServer pull.
description: Without checkpointing, logs cannot trim past the oldest reader. Implement periodic metadata snapshots (like FDBs KeyValueStoreMemory checkpoints) that bound recovery time and enable log trimming. Files: server.ex, new checkpoint.ex, shale/
title: Periodic metadata snapshots for log trimming
